speaker: seller

args.message: Well-equipped 2016 Tahoe LT with leather seating, Bose audio, and third-row capability — perfect for the active family! This full-size SUV has been dealer-serviced and runs strong with the proven 5.3L V8. Ready for your next adventure.

text: Well-equipped 2016 Tahoe LT with leather seating, Bose audio, and third-row capability — perfect for the active family! This full-size SUV has been dealer-serviced and runs strong with the proven 5.3L V8. Ready for your next adventure.

speaker: buyer

args.message: Has this Tahoe been in any accidents?

text: Has this Tahoe been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: Not that I know of! This Tahoe has a clean history, and it runs like a dream. We've got the full service records right here, showing regular maintenance. You can tell it's been well taken care of.

text: Not that I know of! This Tahoe has a clean history, and it runs like a dream. We've got the full service records right here, showing regular maintenance. You can tell it's been well taken care of.

speaker: buyer

args.message: Can I see those service records, please?

text: Can I see those service records, please?

speaker: seller

args.message: Absolutely! Here they are. As you can see, it's been diligently serviced, mostly at a dealership. The previous owner really kept up with it. The last one was just a few months ago, oil change and a once-over. Runs like a top!

args.message: Given the mileage and my budget, I'd be willing to offer $22,000 for it.

text: Given the mileage and my budget, I'd be willing to offer $22,000 for it.

speaker: seller

args.message: That's a solid offer, and I appreciate you coming in! This Tahoe LT is in fantastic shape, and honestly, it's a rare find at this price point. I can do $23,900 for you. I've seen similar models go for way more, especially with this trim and condition.

text: That's a solid offer, and I appreciate you coming in! This Tahoe LT is in fantastic shape, and honestly, it's a rare find at this price point. I can do $23,900 for you. I've seen similar models go for way more, especially with this trim and condition.

speaker: buyer

args.reason: The seller's counter-offer exceeds my budget.
